skills.name: book-boudoir-session
skills.description: Help someone book a luxury boudoir or glamour photography session with Mark Andrew Boudoir in South Bend and the Michiana region. Use when a user wants to book, check availability or pricing, or understand what to expect from a boudoir, couples, men's, bridal, or maternity session. Guides them to book a free 10-minute consultation and explains the full-day experience, same-day reveal, and how the $499 booking and image investment work.
